git.strategy: feature-detect optional commands and record the exact build version

design: Skills are routed by desired postcondition. Groups organize documentation and evaluation priority.

core.description: High-value Git state, topology, recovery, or consequential workflows.

optional.description: Useful but lower-frequency or largely familiar workflows; keep compact and load only on a clear trigger.

skills.name: configure-git
skills.summary: Own Git configuration, identity, signing, attributes, hooks, and helper selection.

skills.name: craft-commits
skills.summary: Turn reviewed local changes into coherent atomic commits.

skills.name: diagnose-repository
skills.summary: Classify confusing Git state without mutation and route to the owning workflow.

skills.name: edit-commit-history
skills.summary: Rewrite one existing commit series in place.

skills.name: find-regression
skills.summary: Locate a behavioral transition with a validated bisect oracle.

skills.name: integrate-branches
skills.summary: Integrate one complete line, including subtree/vendor synchronization.

skills.name: investigate-history
skills.summary: Explain provenance and historical change without mutation.

skills.name: manage-branches
skills.summary: Own local branch lifecycle and metadata without integration.

skills.name: manage-large-files
skills.summary: Own LFS pointer/object relationships and large-object policy.

skills.name: manage-remotes
skills.summary: Own remote identity, URLs, refspecs, and fork/upstream topology.

skills.name: manage-stacked-branches
skills.summary: Restack and coordinate publication of dependent review branches.

skills.name: manage-submodules
skills.summary: Own `.gitmodules`, gitlinks, and nested repository relationships.

skills.name: manage-tags
skills.summary: Own tag object/ref lifecycle and verification.

skills.name: manage-worktrees
skills.summary: Own linked-worktree lifecycle and branch occupancy safety.

skills.name: migrate-repository
skills.summary: Transfer a complete repository and coordinated migration state.

skills.name: optimize-large-repository
skills.summary: Measure and tune a healthy large repository.

skills.name: preserve-work
skills.summary: Create a verified temporary rescue artifact from current uncommitted work.

skills.name: recover-lost-work
skills.summary: Restore intact but unreachable/deleted work additively.

skills.name: repair-repository-integrity
skills.summary: Repair damaged/missing Git objects, packs, refs, alternates, or clone completeness.

skills.name: resolve-conflicts
skills.summary: Resolve semantic conflicts after a Git operation has stopped.

skills.name: setup-repository
skills.summary: Create or clone a repository with the intended topology and completeness policy.

skills.name: sync-branches
skills.summary: Reconcile and publish one local/remote branch relationship.

skills.name: transplant-commits
skills.summary: Replay selected commits or reviewed patch/mailbox series.

skills.name: undo-changes
skills.summary: Reverse a known change or abort known operation state.
